description_long: This rock features a rugged, irregular form with a predominantly off-white to light beige matrix, interspersed with striking, vivid blue crystalline mineral clusters. The blue mineral appears in rounded, botryoidal formations, giving the rock a visually dynamic and textured appearance. Portions of the rock's surface are darker, with brownish-gray patches that suggest weathering or mineral inclusions. The crystalline blue areas are distributed unevenly, with some faces showing dense clusters and others only a few scattered nodules. The overall surface is rough and jagged, with sharp edges and a granular texture. This rock would stand out as a decorative or naturalistic element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A rough, off-white rock with vivid blue crystalline clusters and brownish-gray patches, featuring a jagged, textured surface.
description_view_0: The rock displays prominent blue crystalline clusters on a mostly off-white surface, with some brownish areas visible on the left.
description_view_1: This side shows a large brownish-gray patch dominating the right, with blue crystals emerging from the left and top edges.
description_view_2: The view is dominated by a dark brownish-gray surface, with only a few blue crystals peeking over the top and left edges.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective reveals a central depression surrounded by blue crystals and a mix of off-white and brownish surfaces.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or decorative garden bed
